description: Open Responses (LMStudio) Responses streaming (text-only). Validates canonical v3 text blocks, response-metadata, and finish usage/finishReason mapping on a non-OpenAI endpoint.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeOpenAIClient against llm_dart_openai_compatible OpenAIResponses parser.

notes: This scenario exists to ensure OpenAI Responses stream parsing remains portable to local/self-hosted endpoints.
